finding_results.evidence: Ji-eun contraction-heavy pressure lines: chapters/chapter_10.md:407, chapters/chapter_10.md:411, chapters/chapter_10.md:415, chapters/chapter_10.md:423, chapters/chapter_10.md:427; Ina legal points now challenged/interrupted: chapters/chapter_10.md:421, chapters/chapter_10.md:423, chapters/chapter_10.md:425
finding_results.notes: Reworked the exchange from stiff repeated uncontracted phrasing to stress-true colloquial cadence. Preserved legal substance while adding interruption/challenge so the legal strategy lands as contested dialogue rather than uninterrupted recital.

summary: Revised the Busan contract-protection exchange to improve dialogue realism and idiolect separation under pressure: Ji-eun now speaks with contractions across the key run of lines, and Ina's legal framing is broken by direct challenge to avoid transcript cadence while retaining the same stakes and legal content.
